recommended_baseline.rationale: Explicitly identified as 'the only clean pre-regression source' in commit 575d4e2. All bridge-patched* files were born with regressions (duplicate pip-overlay DOM IDs, composeFocusMute without onblur, Thai space-stripping regex). This file has clean RTCPeerConnection lifecycle, epoch-safe Deepgram reconnection, correct offer/answer guards, and a normalization pipeline free of known regressions. 1,620 lines; auditable. All 29 test cases verified at commit 575d4e2 which was built from this file.

normalization.reason: onDGFinal pipeline (lines 1171-1203): correct detected-lang -> selected-source -> selected-target chain. NFC-only normalization (no NFKC/NFC double-normalize). No Thai space-stripping regex. applyNorthernThaiMap absent but can be backported from bridge-patched-v1 lines 679-688.

tts.reason: speakText() at line 719: cancel-before-speak, TTS_LOCALE mapping at line 377, fires on partner messages only when transcriptTtsOn=true. No interruption storm risk. For phrasebook-card TTS (pbSpeakCard), use bridge-patched-v1 at 8d168b1.

phrasebook.reason: Full phrasebook v2+: pbUseText(id, src/tgt), pbSpeakCard, pbOpenNewCard, pbExportPrompt, pbOpenBooksModal. pbCloseDrawer calls _pbRestoreMic so mic unmutes after Use. Snapshot preserved in bridge-reborn-v1.html. Lightweight alternative: bridge-restore-plus-3 at f42720c (/ search drawer, 2-entry seed).

health_logging.reason: ft-status-pill in lobby (lines 54-59, 227): fades when ready, not intrusive. verifyDgKey and setCfTurnStatus provide key/TURN status. FastText _loadFastText is simpler (2-asset) vs patched-v1 elaborate 4-asset path. DG watchdog reference: bridge-patched-v1 at 8d168b1 lines 2573-2586.

strengths: Cleanest call spine; no known regressions
Epoch-safe DG reconnection via captureEpoch guard
Correct ICE candidate queuing and dedup (_seenRemoteCand)
ontrack handler deduplicates tracks by ID before adding to remoteStream
NFC-only normalization; no Thai space-stripping; no double-normalize
subtitleSeq dedup in addTr (eb4ac22 fix) prevents duplicate transcript entries

composeFocusMute absent — no auto-mute confusion
Explicitly chosen as foundation for 29-test verified v4.0.0 build

PiP is swapVideos() CSS toggle, not overlay; different UX
Lightweight phrasebook (/ search only); no CRUD or import/export
No applyNorthernThaiMap for Northern Thai dialect normalization
